w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: 0 — Global design tokens (copy into globals.css or design-tokens file)
Trust & Safety and Footer sections may use --
-deep-indigo as a full-width background. No other section may be full indigo.
-light) may only be used as a
Headings and body text on dark backgrounds MUST use white (--
-black. Replace only with tokens above per mapping below.
change layout, spacing, fonts, icons, or decorative artwork in this update — only backgrounds and text
Navbar, Hero, Video, Problem (Why This Programme), Cultural highlights, Safety (Trust & Safety), Testimonials, Investment/payment (Pricing), Registration, Download brochure, FAQ, Final CTA, Footer
For each section sample class names are provided — adapt to your project naming.
No decorative solid pink or indigo behind hero.
Video card: keep as existing; ensure card BG remains white or light rice-white.
Card icon background (if any): use transparent with icon
All text in section-safety must meet WCAG contrast (aim >= 4.5:1 for body).
deep-indigo full background section prior to footer.
tint section. Do not add more pink sections elsewhere.
-primary-red) (use full red as final decisive banner)
If project already used indigo here by intentional design and you must keep it, convert to
make footer and final CTA both indigo — final CTA should be red for decision clarity.
This is the final deep-indigo section.
Add these to your utilities file so the IDE can map older
Indigo section (deep-indigo) body text should be
All CTA buttons should have contrast ratio ≥ 4.5:1 (primary red on white or white on red is OK).
-primary-red meet 3:1 for large text or 4.5:1 for small; prefer red for CTAs.
If any contrast fails, fallback suggestion:
Increase text weight or use #ffffff on dark bg.
For small light text on indigo, use
6 — Replacement & verification checklist (run after IDE changes)
Search and replace (run via CLI / IDE search):
Replace only where appropriate per mapping. Do
Final CTA: primary-red full width (white text)
Sakura-light sections present = at most 2 (Problem + Registration)
Red full-width sections present = at most 1 (Final CTA — if already red else keep existing but prefer red)
7 — Notes for the IDE operator / reviewer (short)
. If the IDE auto-changes other properties (text
Do not replace content images or SVG fills unless specifically intended (only change backgrounds and text
If any component uses inline style with hex
If the project uses utility-first classes (Tailwind), map these tokens into tailwind.config.js
